payload.answer: Conflict detected: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while new input says Sara is your niece. Do not overwrite durable memory without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The new input refers to the same named person but asserts a directly conflicting family relationship with existing memory. Identity appears unresolved only in role, not in name.

details: Detected contradiction in core kinship relation.

repair_options: Ask whether these statements refer to the same Sara.
Ask which relationship is correct now.
If there are two different people named Sara, create separate entities with distinguishing context.
